content.en:
At this moment, Ye Tian gradually felt that all aspects of the Ultimate Ancient Demon Era were crushing the era he was in, perhaps because the heaven and earth of this era were more suitable for cultivation, and the years experienced in this era were even longer, and there were many strong people.

And in his time, there were only a dozen Ultimate Extreme Honors, and even if these Ultimate Extreme Masters researched something, they would not be passed down.

The Ultimate Exaltation is high above all beings.

And in this era, even an ancient demon-level existence comparable to the ultimate supreme will continue to pass on various inheritances in order to develop their own tribes, and these inheritances will gradually leak out, and there will also be various ancient level inheritances and so on.

Therefore, in this era, all kinds of knowledge have spread, and even some of the knowledge mastered by the emperor level is comparable to the ultimate supreme of his time.

Of course, this is just his guess.

"I wonder if the Doomsday Supreme Venerable has ever been to this era?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

Maybe they've also gotten an item like the Arrow's Crystal, and they've been here since 25, or maybe they've never been there.

If he had been here, their strength would have been even more powerful than he had imagined.

Of course, they may have been here, or they may have fallen before they have grown up, so they will not be able to gain much.

He knew very well that once he fell, he didn't really fall, but he would go back from this era, and it would be difficult to come back to this era.

If possible, he wanted to cultivate in this era for a long time, and eventually cultivate to the end of this era.

Something big has definitely happened in the future that this era has come to an end, otherwise those ultimate ancient demons would not have slept in that place, and many traces would have been erased.

So, if he had experienced the end of this era, he would know what had happened in this era.

Time passed.

There are also king-level beings who cracked the phantom array, obtained bonus items, and then went to the third level.

And Ye Tian was still not in a hurry, he continued to comprehend these phantom formations and master more formation knowledge.

And just like that, another long time passed.

"It's been half the time!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Patriarch Crane Shadow had mentioned to him the time when this ancient demon-level relic would be opened, and once the time ran out, all of them would be removed from the ruins, and this ancient demon-level ruins would be closed again.

"Almost, the value of the phantom array here is not too great, it can't compare to those ancient demon tablets, let's come here!"

Ye Tian immediately cracked a phantom array.

In an instant, he appeared in a phantom array space, and a dense array of treasures appeared in the shadows, allowing him to choose one as a reward.

He glanced around and began to think about which treasure to choose.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian pointed to a treasure phantom.

【Ten Realms Golden Magic Fruit】

This is a treasure that can improve physical fitness, and for general-level existence, it can greatly increase physical strength.

If he takes it, Ye Tian's physical strength will skyrocket, at least he can be promoted to the peak of the general level, or it won't be long before he can be promoted to the extreme of the general level, so that he can impact the king level.

It's just that this kind of treasure has little effect on the king, and no king-level will choose it.

But for Ye Tian, who is a general, this treasure is more cost-effective and more suitable for him.

As for the other treasures, they may be very good, but they don't make his strength skyrocket, and he almost can't look down on them.

For example, a few treasures that can assist in comprehending the ultimate rules, the king level may choose, so that the ultimate rules can be quickly improved.

But Ye Tian doesn't need to improve the ultimate rule at all, his ultimate rule of ten thousand laws, he can quickly improve it by slowly comprehending it, where do you need to use these resources!

Therefore, the Ten Realms Golden Demon Fruit was the treasure he needed the most and was also the most suitable.

Wow!!!

A black fruit full of golden veins appeared in his hand, this was the Ten Realms Golden Demon Fruit.

Ye Tian put away this Ten Realms Golden Demon Fruit, now is not the time to eat it, and there is no time to refine it, and after going out, he will refine and improve his physical body.

Swish!

Ye Tian instantly came to the third level, where a group of king-level people had already gathered.

But when these kings saw Ye Tian, a general, they were a little surprised.

After all, it is really not easy for the general level to break through to the third level, even if the general level is talented and demonic, but the mastery of knowledge is far inferior to that of these top kings.

Many king-level people didn't even comprehend the ultimate rules, they couldn't understand those formations, and they couldn't even understand the ancient magic tablet.

Of course, they were just shocked and didn't pay much attention to Ye Tian.

The third level is very difficult, and in front of them is a black mountain.

This level of assessment requires them to enter Montenegro, but Montenegro has a special kind of domain, no matter how hard they try, they can't climb this Montenegro.

Ye Tian also tried to rush up and try it, but suddenly he felt a terrifying force of the domain field, which directly shook him out.

"This field mobilizes the ultimate particle of Black Mountain, and although it has no attack power, it has a terrifying repulsion. If you want to crack this field, you must understand and perceive the ultimate particle permutations and combinations here, so as to create an ultimate 897 arcane to break through the field here. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

And creating the ultimate arcane is not easy, and many king-level beings have not mastered the ultimate arcane.

After all, the ultimate arcane is not so easy to create, even if the ultimate particles of this era are everywhere and have various inheritances, but it is not so easy to create.

It was precisely because Ye Tian had mastered the ultimate rules and created the ultimate arcane that the patriarch was so shocked.

After all, the patriarch himself has not mastered the ultimate arcane, and he has only mastered some powerful ultimate killing moves.

I saw Ye Tian sitting cross-legged and began to comprehend this black mountain.

The more he comprehended, the more he felt the extraordinaryness of this black mountain, and countless ultimate particles were compressed on this black mountain.

He even felt that this black mountain would help him comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm in the future.

"This Black Mountain is equivalent to a natural realm of ultimate rules!!

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

Therefore, he worked harder to comprehend the domain of this black mountain, so as to comprehend more mysteries.

In this way, the years passed, and time gradually came to the time when the ruins were closing.

And this time.

Ye Tian had already created an ultimate arcane art, the Escape of the Demon Wings, and he quickly cast the Escape of the Demon Wings, tore apart the domain field, and entered this black mountain.
